title: Crystal Vanilla Tweaks
description: A edit of the Crystal Vanilla by Nestor. For Crystal PvP!
body:
# Crystal Vanilla Tweaks This pack is an edit of [Crystal Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crystal-vanilla) by [Nestor](https://modrinth.com/user/Nestor). I've edited some assets and removed some to fix some bugs for 1.20. This pack also includes some textures from [xSpinHDx's](https://modrinth.com/user/xSpinHDx) Vanilla Plus Beta pack.
♦ Credits ♦ [Nestor](https://modrinth.com/user/Nestor) [xSpinHDx](https://modrinth.com/user/xSpinHDx)
